description: Court record concerning evidence of possession of a compound in Fustat, mentioning lanes and buildings in the city including two kanīsa, the zuqāq al-laban. Dated Tammuz 1441/July 1130. The witnesses (al-shuhūd al-muthbitīn) declare that they inspected the house of R. Sabtī together with a warrāq kabīr fī l-wirāqa (a well-respected notary?). The notary (al-waththāq) read to them what was written in R. Sabtī's property documents (kutub) and they assessed the boundaries mentioned therein thoroughly (kashafahā ilaynā bi-kashf jayyid). They found no discrepancy. (AP)
description_he: פרוטוקול בית דין על רכוש חצר בפוסטאט: מוזכרים סמטאות ובנינים כולל שתי כנסיות (כנסת) ו'זוקאק אל-לבן'. תאריך: תמוז 1441 = יולי 1130. עדים בדקו ביחד עם נוטריון.
